title: Connect Agent Factory onboarding to OpenClaw AI drafting
summary: Added an OpenClaw-powered suggestion endpoint and UI action so Agent Factory can auto-draft advanced professional profile fields.
changes: Added OpenClaw-backed /api/agents/factory/suggest route for structured profile generation.
Added JSON extraction and response polling logic for model output reliability.
Added AI Draft Profile button in Agent Factory modal to autofill advanced fields.
Added objective-first validation before invoking AI suggestions.
risks: AI draft quality depends on OpenClaw provider auth and model availability.
rollback: Remove suggest route and AI Draft Profile button while retaining manual onboarding flow.
